subcodes.first_line: O 'Andalib! We have hearkened unto thy melodies, thy warblings and thy songs in the garden of loving-kindness and favors. We beseech Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عندلیب سمعنا نغماتک و تغرداتک و ترنماتک فی بستان العنایه و الالطاف نسئله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection
